name: Stitches
description: A Tank who wants to isolate distant enemies away from their team.
title: Terror of Darkshire
info: Take care when traversing the shadowed trails of Duskwood...<n/>Ever since Abercrombie the Embalmer unleashed his vile abomination upon Darkshire, Stitches has wandered the road aimlessly, hungering for the flesh of low level Alliance players.

Stitches.name: Hook
Stitches.description: Pull the first enemy hit towards Stitches and deal 91 (+4% per level) damage.  After reaching level 13, Hook's range is increased by 40%.

Stitches.name: Slam
Stitches.description: Deal 104 (+4% per level) damage to enemies within the target area. Enemies in the inner impact take 50% more damage and are Slowed by 45% for 2 seconds.

Stitches.name: Devour
Stitches.description: Deal 319 (+4% per level) damage to non-Heroic units, or 114 (+4% per level) damage to Heroes. Restores 20% of Stitches's maximum Health.

Stitches.name: Putrid Bile
Stitches.description: Emit bile that deals 37 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies within, Slowing them by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Gain 20% Movement Speed while emitting bile. Lasts 8 seconds.

Stitches.name: Gorge
Stitches.description: Consume an enemy Hero, trapping them for 4 seconds. When Gorge ends, the enemy Hero takes 274 (+4% per level) damage. The trapped Hero cannot move or act and doesn't take damage from other sources.

Stitches.name: Shambling Horror
Stitches.description: Activate to spread Vile Gas in a large area every second and prevent your Movement Speed from being reduced below 110% for 4 seconds.  Vile Gas Hitting enemies with Basic Attacks or the inner area of Slam afflicts them with Vile Gas, dealing an additional 36 (+4% per level) damage over 4 seconds. Deals 150% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.

Stitches.name: Helping Hand
Stitches.description: Activate to use Hook that can hit allied Heroes. Hitting an allied Hero this way reduces the cooldown of Hook by 8 seconds.  After reaching level 13, Helping Hand's range is increased by 40%.

1.name: Patchwork Creation
1.description: Gain 3 Armor for every unit afflicted with Vile Gas, stacking up to 8 times. While Shambling Horror is active, this Armor amount is doubled.  Passive: Increase regeneration effects and all healing received by 15%.

1.name: Savor The Flavor
1.description: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Devour increases Stitches' Health Regeneration by 1.5 and the damage of Vile Gas by 2%, stacking up to 100 times.

1.name: Hungry for More
1.description: Gain 5% Movement Speed.  Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Stitches's maximum Health by 25.  Reward: Every 20 Globes gathered permanently increases Stitches' Movement Speed by an additional 5%.

4.name: Playtime!
4.description: Basic Attacks restore 5 Mana and reduce Slam's cooldown by 0.75 seconds.  For each enemy Hero hit by Slam's inner area, restore 5 Mana and reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.

4.name: Vile Cleaver
4.description: Basic Attacks against enemies with Vile Gas deal 35% more damage and spreads Vile Gas to nearby enemies.  Passive: Slam applies Vile Gas to all targets hit.

4.name: Tenderizer
4.description: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes Slow by 20% for 1.5 seconds and restore 1.75% of Stitches' maximum Health.

7.name: Serrated Edge
7.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook deals bonus damage equal to 5% of their maximum Health, reduces Hook's cooldown by 4 seconds, and restores 35 Mana.

7.name: Second Helping
7.description: Devour gains 1 additional charge with a 6 second cooldown between uses.  Gambit: If Stitches is at max Health after using Devour, he gains a Shield equal to 15% of his maximum Health for 10 seconds. Every death, reduce this Shield by 3%.

7.name: Putrefaction
7.description: While Shambling Horror is active, Vile Gas reduces healing received by 40%.  Passive: Vile Gas heals Stitches for 75% of the damage dealt.

10.name: Putrid Bile
10.description: Emit bile that deals 37 (+4% per level) damage per second to enemies within, Slowing them by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Gain 20% Movement Speed while emitting bile. Lasts 8 seconds.

10.name: Gorge
10.description: Consume an enemy Hero, trapping them for 4 seconds. When Gorge ends, the enemy Hero takes 274 (+4% per level) damage. The trapped Hero cannot move or act and doesn't take damage from other sources.

13.name: Meat Hook
13.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook heals Stitches for 20% of his maximum Health over 5 seconds. While active, Basic Attacks against the Hero hit refresh the duration of this effect.

13.name: Under Pressure
13.description: Increase Slam's damage by 25.  Quest: After damaging Heroes with Vile Gas 6 times, permanently increase the damage of Slam by 1, to a maximum of 75 additional damage.

13.name: Chop Chop
13.description: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror grants 40% increased Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration of this effect.

16.name: Pulverize
16.description: All enemies hit by Slam are Slowed by 70% for 0.75 seconds and Heroes have their Armor reduced by 10 for 3 seconds.

16.name: Digestive Juices
16.description: Devour deals an additional 140 (+4% per level) damage over 5 seconds. When used on a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds and causes the Hero hit to deal 50% reduced damage for 4 seconds.

16.name: Flare Up
16.description: Deals 15 (+4% per level) damage per second to nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror increases this damage by 150% for 4 seconds.

20.name: Gift From The Embalmer
20.description: Putrid Bile deals 100% more damage to Heroes.  Quest: Each time Putrid Bile damages an enemy Hero, the duration of Stitches' next death timer is reduced by 2%, to a maximum of 80% total reduction. All stacks of this effect are lost upon death.

20.name: Hungry Hungry Stitches
20.description: For 4 seconds after using Gorge, Stitches can teleport a short distance to additional targets and Gorge them. Enemies are Slowed by 75% for 1 second after Gorge ends.

20.name: Master Hooker
20.description: Reduce the cooldown of Hook by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Hook have 75% reduced healing for 2 seconds. Allies hit by Helping Hand are Unkillable for 2 seconds.

20.name: Gas Bag
20.description: Activating Shambling Horror grants Unstoppable for 3 seconds.  Passive: Shambling Horror's cooldown is reduced by 20 seconds.

tooltipMarkup.StitchesChopChop: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror grants <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Behavior,StitchesShamblingHorrorChopChopTalentBuff,Modification.AdditiveAttackSpeedFactor"/>%</c> increased Attack Speed for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesShamblingHorrorChopChopTalentBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration of this effect.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesDevour: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StitchesDevourCreepDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to non-Heroic units, or <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StitchesDevourHeroDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to Heroes. Restores <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StitchesDevourCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction * 100"/>%</c> of Stitches's maximum Health.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesDevourSavorTheFlavorTalent: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Devour increases Stitches' Health Regeneration by and the damage of Vile Gas by %, stacking up to times.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesDigestiveJuices: Devour deals an additional <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesDevourDigestiveJuicesTalentDoT,Duration*Effect,StitchesDevourDigestiveJuicesTalentDoTDamage,Amount"/></c> damage over <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesDevourDigestiveJuicesTalentDoT,Duration"/></c> seconds. When used on a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Effect,StitchesDevourDigestiveJuicesModifyCooldown,Cost[0].ChargeTimeUse"Player="0"/></c> seconds and causes the Hero hit to deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,StitchesDevourDigestiveJuicesTalentDebuff,Modification.DamageDealtFraction[Ability]"/>%</c> reduced damage for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesDevourDigestiveJuicesTalentDebuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesFlareUp: Deals <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StitchesGasFlareDamage,Amount*2"/></c> damage per second to nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror increases this damage by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,StitchesGasFlareDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[HasActiveBuff].Modifier"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesGasFlareActiveBuff,Duration"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesGasBag: Activating Shambling Horror grants Unstoppable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesShamblingHorrorGasBagTalentUnstoppable,Duration"/></c> seconds.<n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive: </c>Shambling Horror's cooldown is reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Talent,StitchesGasBag,AbilityModificationArray[0].Modifications[1].Value"/></c> seconds.

Enemies are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,StitchesGorgeHungryHungryStitchesTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesGorgeHungryHungryStitchesTalentSlow,Duration"/></c> second after Gorge ends.

Allies hit by Helping Hand are Unkillable for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesHookMasterHookerHealingReductionBehavior,Duration"/></c> seconds.

tooltipMarkup.StitchesSlam: Deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Effect,StitchesSlamDamage,Amount"/></c> damage to enemies within the target area. Enemies in the inner impact take <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,StitchesSlamMediumRangeDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[Crit].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage and are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-100*Behavior,StitchesSlamSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesSlamSlow,Duration"precision="2"player="0"/></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesSlamPulverizeTalent: All enemies hit by Slam are Slowed by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,StitchesSlamPulverizeTalentSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesSlamPulverizeTalentSlow,Duration" player="0" precision="2"/></c> seconds and Heroes have their Armor reduced by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-Behavior,StitchesSlamPulverizeTalentArmorDebuff,ArmorModification.AllArmorBonus"/></c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesSlamPulverizeTalentArmorDebuff,Duration"/></c></c> seconds.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesUnderPressure: Increase Slam's damage by .Quest: After damaging Heroes with Vile Gas times, permanently increase the damage of Slam by , to a maximum of additional damage.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesVileCleaver: Basic Attacks against enemies with Vile Gas deal <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,StitchesHeroWeaponDamage,MultiplicativeModifierArray[VileCleaver].Modifier"/>%</c> more damage and spreads Vile Gas to nearby enemies. <n/><n/><c val="#AbilityPassive">Passive:</c> Slam applies Vile Gas to all targets hit.
tooltipMarkup.StitchesVileGasTenderizerTalent: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes Slow by <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="-1*Behavior,StitchesTenderizerSlow,Modification.UnifiedMoveSpeedFactor*100" precision="2"/>%</c> for <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="Behavior,StitchesTenderizerSlow,Duration" precision="2"/></c> seconds and restore <c val="#TooltipNumbers"><d ref="100*Effect,StitchesHeroWeaponTenderizerTalentCreateHealer,RechargeVitalFraction" precision = "2"/>%</c> of Stitches' maximum Health.
